syntax_fix_detail: lean4/Axioms.lean lines 12-32 use non-standard `axiom name : T := by ...` form which is not valid Lean 4 (axiom takes only a type, no body); confirms file has never been elaborated
rationale: All 10 sorries are in files outside the Lake build graph (lean_lib SIARCRelay11 roots transitively closes inside the SIARCRelay11/ subdirectory only); MasterCertificate's #print axioms output will list only the 9 documented axioms in SIARCRelay11/Theorems/AxiomInventory.lean and contain no sorryAx; JAR's rejection appears to be a grep-based finding lacking build-graph context; resolution = move legacy files to lean4/legacy/, update manuscript Infrastructure paragraph to '0 sorry across build target', attach #print axioms supplementary, cover letter to Blanchette
